sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92265" key="r(e/gma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥέγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥέζω</foreign> (B)) <sense id="n92265.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is dyed</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope> </bibl> B; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥέγος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
